endpoints.name: GET /providers/Microsoft.PowerBI/operations
endpoints.description: Indicates which operations can be performed by the Power BI Resource Provider.

endpoints.name: POST /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.PowerBI/locations/{location}/checkNameAvailability
endpoints.description: Verify the specified Power BI Workspace Collection name is valid and not already in use.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{LOCATION}} with a real location.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.PowerBI/workspaceCollections
endpoints.description: Retrieves all existing Power BI workspace collections in the specified subscription.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid.

endpoints.name: POST /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/moveResources
endpoints.description: Migrates an existing Power BI Workspace Collection to a different resource group and/or subscription.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.PowerBI/workspaceCollections
endpoints.description: Retrieves all existing Power BI workspace collections in the specified resource group.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.PowerBI/workspaceCollections/{workspaceCollectionName}
endpoints.description: Retrieves an existing Power BI Workspace Collection.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{WORKSPACECOLLECTIONNAME}} with a real workspacecollectionname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: PUT /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.PowerBI/workspaceCollections/{workspaceCollectionName}
endpoints.description: Creates a new Power BI Workspace Collection with the specified properties. A Power BI Workspace Collection contains one or more workspaces, and can be used to provision keys that provide API access to those workspaces.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{WORKSPACECOLLECTIONNAME}} with a real workspacecollectionname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: DELETE /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.PowerBI/workspaceCollections/{workspaceCollectionName}
endpoints.description: Delete a Power BI Workspace Collection.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{WORKSPACECOLLECTIONNAME}} with a real workspacecollectionname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: PATCH /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.PowerBI/workspaceCollections/{workspaceCollectionName}
endpoints.description: Update an existing Power BI Workspace Collection with the specified properties.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{WORKSPACECOLLECTIONNAME}} with a real workspacecollectionname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: POST /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.PowerBI/workspaceCollections/{workspaceCollectionName}/listKeys
endpoints.description: Retrieves the primary and secondary access keys for the specified Power BI Workspace Collection.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{WORKSPACECOLLECTIONNAME}} with a real workspacecollectionname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: POST /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.PowerBI/workspaceCollections/{workspaceCollectionName}/regenerateKey
endpoints.description: Regenerates the primary or secondary access key for the specified Power BI Workspace Collection.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{WORKSPACECOLLECTIONNAME}} with a real workspacecollectionname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.PowerBI/workspaceCollections/{workspaceCollectionName}/workspaces
endpoints.description: Retrieves all existing Power BI workspaces in the specified workspace collection.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{WORKSPACECOLLECTIONNAME}} with a real workspacecollectionname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.
